reply_original: Thanks for the great suggestion! Adding more recognizable IPs is a brilliant idea. I've shared this with our product team. We'd love to know which specific characters or IPs you want to see! Please email your wishlist to support@fantachat.ai so we can make it happen. Thanks for helping us improve!
reply_zh: 感谢您的宝贵建议！增加更多高辨识度的IP是一个绝妙的主意。我已经将这个想法分享给我们的产品团队了。我们非常想知道您最想看到哪些具体的角色或IP！请将您的心愿单发送邮件至 support@fantachat.ai，以便我们帮您实现。感谢您帮助我们不断改进！
